texto: Loss will gut-punch you no matter the age of the deceased. It drops you to your knees. It shatters the dreams of your families...It brings tears, anger, shock and a rejection of faith--or the complete opposite: a reliance on faith. It creates the walking wounded.
explicacao: Citação de Mary Jedlicka Humston sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “Loss will gut-punch you no matter the age of the deceased. It drops you to your knees. It shatter…” articula motivacao, faith, loss em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como luto e loss.
